task_completion.description: Configure the site title and tagline
task_completion.visual_evidence: The site title 'NexGen Solutions' and tagline 'Innovative Technology Consulting' should be visible in the WordPress Settings -> General page or in the frontend site header.
The pages 'Services', 'About', and 'Careers' should be visible in the WordPress Pages list without any parent page indication.

task_completion.description: Create the required child pages under 'Services'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pages 'Web Development', 'Mobile Apps', and 'Cloud Solutions' should be visible in the WordPress Pages list, visually nested under the 'Services' page (usually indicated by a dash prefix).

task_completion.description: Add at least 50 words of relevant content to each page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the page editor or frontend should show substantial text content (visually appearing to be at least 50 words or a few paragraphs) that is relevant to the respective page titles.

task_completion.description: Set 'Services' as the static front page
task_completion.visual_evidence: In WordPress Settings -> Reading, 'A static page' should be selected with 'Homepage' set to 'Services', or the frontend root URL should display the 'Services' page.

integrity.description: Agent used the WordPress admin dashboard to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the WordPress web interface (wp-admin) rather than terminal commands or database manipulation.

integrity.description: Agent generated actual professional content instead of gibberish
integrity.visual_evidence: The text added to the pages should look like genuine, relevant professional content, not just repeated characters or copy-pasted task descriptions.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected configurations and pages must be seen within the actual WordPress application, not written in a text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The site title must be exactly 'NexGen Solutions' and the tagline 'Innovative Technology Consulting'. The required pages are 'Services' (parent), 'Web Development' (child of Services), 'Mobile Apps' (child of Services), 'Cloud Solutions' (child of Services), 'About' (no parent), and 'Careers' (no parent). The 'Services' page must be set as the static front page.
